items.title: 2. Sanction / decline communication
items.content: Within 7 working days of complete documentation.

items.title: 3. Disbursal
items.content: Within 2 working days of signed loan agreement.

items.title: 5. NOC after closure
items.content: Within 7 working days of full repayment.

items.title: 7. Customer rights
items.content: Right to fair treatment, transparency, suitability, privacy and grievance redressal as per RBI Charter.
